intended_use_full: Constellation is intended for non-invasive labeling and calculation of quantitative measurements for anatomical regions. Constellation utilizes DICOM MR images gathered on a GE MR450W that encompass the whole-body. It is intended to be used for healthy adult patients. Clinicians may use Constellation as a clinical decision support tool, but it is not to be used in triage events, emergency medicine, or critical care. A clinician retains the ultimate responsibility for making the pertinent diagnosis based on their standard practices.
ground_truth: Manual segmentations established via inter-rater and intra-rater variability studies; majority voting of three radiologists for liver VOI placement
other_metrics: Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC), mean percent absolute difference, Pearson's correlation coefficient
